hooks._note: These hooks are declarative intent. Enforcement is in CLAUDE.md + .claude/skills/agentic-apps-workflow/SKILL.md via the commitment principle. Orchestrator code does NOT read this block today.

design_shotgun.evidence: UI-SPEC.md references variant paths + user's pick

design_critique.evidence: UI-SPEC.md cites impeccable critique scores per variant

tdd_enforcement.evidence: atomic test(RED) + feat(GREEN) commit pair per task

ui_preview.evidence: screenshot path in commit message or SUMMARY.md

verification_before_done.evidence: grep/test/curl/screenshot output posted before status change

multi_ai_plan_review.evidence: {padded_phase}-REVIEWS.md in phase directory, output from ≥2 reviewer CLIs
multi_ai_plan_review.rationale: ADR 0018 — closes drift observed in cparx phases 04.9–05

sub_gates.evidence: DB-AUDIT.md in phase directory; all High and Critical findings resolved or acknowledged via templates/adr-db-security-acceptance.md; otherwise BLOCKS branch close

branch_close.evidence: PR description lists skills + gates + evidence links

impeccable_audit.trigger: feature touches frontend && branch ready to merge
impeccable_audit.evidence: audit report referenced in PR description; no Red findings unresolved

db_pre_launch_audit.scope: full — audit every supported backend in the project, not phase-scoped
db_pre_launch_audit.trigger: branch is main && app pre-launch checklist active
db_pre_launch_audit.evidence: Pre-launch DB-AUDIT.md with zero Critical, zero High findings; otherwise BLOCKS launch
